name: Buttermilk-Cayenne Onion Rings
recipeIngredient: 2 each Large sweet onions (Vidalias are fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onions into thin rings.
2. In a shallow dish, whisk together the egg yolk, flour, cayenne, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the buttermilk to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Coat each onion ring in the batter thoroughly.
5. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep fryer or heavy-based saucepan to 375°F (190°C).
6. When the oil is hot enough, carefully add the coated onion rings in batches, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan.
7. Fry for 4 to 5 minutes, or until the onion rings are lightly browned and crispy.
8. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried onion rings from the oil and place them on a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
